title: Aurora Cannabis Inc (ACB) Q2 2025 Earnings Call Highlights: Record Growth in Medical Cannabis
text: Yahoo Finance highlights Aurora Cannabis Q2 2025 earnings call key takeaways. Record metrics: Record medical cannabis revenue of $61.3 million in quarter. 41% year-over-year growth demonstrating accelerating trajectory. International medical revenue doubled year-over-year. Management commentary: CEO emphasized medical-first strategy working well. Profitability improving through volume growth and margin discipline. International expansion ahead of plan in multiple markets. Financial strength: Strong cash position enabling strategic investments. Adjusted EBITDA positive and growing. Free cash flow approaching positive inflection point. Segment performance: Medical cannabis 64% of total revenue and 90% of gross profit. International representing 60% of medical cannabis revenue. Gross margins expanding due to product mix and operational leverage. Germany opportunity: Management detailed German market opportunity and penetration strategy. Double-digit patient growth rates following descheduling. Telehealth model working well. Prescriber relationships expanding. Australia position: MedReleaf platform proving valuable. Market share #2 position sustainable and growing. Distribution expansion underway. Forward guidance: Full year revenue guidance maintained. Medical segment expected to drive overall growth. Strong margins anticipated. Free cash flow improvement expected. Strategic priorities: Continue international expansion. Optimize manufacturing and margin profile. Pursue accretive M&A opportunities. Quarterly emphasis: Medical cannabis opportunity globally larger than originally anticipated. Aurora positioned to capture meaningful share. Competitive advantages sustainable through manufacturing infrastructure.
